name: Tandoori Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Make deep cuts in the chicken pieces so that the spices seep in quickly.
2. If using soy sauce as a base, brush some onto the chicken pieces and let it absorb into the cuts.
3. Rub the spice mixture evenly over the chicken or apply each spice separately. The goal is for the spices to seep into the cuts along with the soy sauce (or yogurt). You can let it sit for a short time to allow the spices to soak in.
4. If using yogurt, mix the spices first, then rub them onto the chicken pieces as before. The leftover water from the yogurt should be allowed to evaporate during cooking; this prevents the pieces from drying out. I haven't noticed any dryness with the soy sauce version.
5. Cook until the chicken turns brown and the cuts expand.
Notes:
You can use other sauces as a base, such as Teriyaki or an Oriental marinade.
